content_body: There's nothing like a morning cup of coffee in a bucolic setting overlooking a slow-moving river. The cabin facilities were great, but it was the calm surroundings that put us into vacation mode from the time we arrived. The kids enjoyed the downstairs bedrooms away from the adults, and we appreciated that we could enjoy a late-night glass of wine on the deck before retiring to bed. Easy access to the supermarket or Walmart for any forgotten items. This was a great rental that I would highly recommend.
title: Highly Recommend
